38197.title: Amol Rajan Interviews Sundar Pichai
38197.description: Amol Rajan talks to Google's CEO, Sundar Pichai, at his Silicon Valley HQ. They tackle a range of topical issues, from the company's hotly-debated privacy practices and tax policies to its pioneering development in AI and quantum computing.

38214.title: Amol Rajan Interviews Sundar Pichai
38214.description: In an in-depth interview the BBC's Media Editor, Amol Rajan, speaks to Google's CEO, Sundar Pichai.
